title: Delhi University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Delhi University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
